strings.app.name: Lextures
strings.auth.login.title: Sign in
strings.auth.login.subtitle: Use the email your course or school uses. SSO options appear when your organization connects them.
strings.auth.login.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Is the API running?
strings.auth.login.forgotPasswordHint: Password reset will be available in a future app update.
strings.auth.login.ssoRequired: Your organization requires single sign-on. Use the button above.
strings.auth.login.ssoCancelled: Sign-in was cancelled. Try again when you're ready.
strings.auth.login.ssoFailed: Single sign-on did not complete. Try again or use another method.
strings.auth.login.magicLinkHint: We will email you a one-time link that signs you in without a password.
strings.auth.login.magicLinkSent: If an account exists with that email, you will receive a sign-in link shortly.
strings.auth.login.magicLinkFailed: Could not send a magic link. Try again.
strings.auth.login.magicLinkExpired: This sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
strings.auth.mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
strings.auth.mfa.subtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app, use a passkey, or a backup code.
strings.auth.mfa.setupSubtitle: Your organization requires a second sign-in step. Add an authenticator app or passkey.
strings.auth.mfa.scanInstructions: Add this account in your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code.
strings.auth.mfa.invalidCode: That code did not work. Try again.
strings.auth.mfa.passkeyUnsupported: Passkeys are not available on this device.
strings.auth.signup.title: Create your account
strings.auth.signup.subtitle: One account for courses, assignments, and messages. If your school uses SSO, you can sign in that way later.
strings.common.locale.label: Language
strings.common.locale.description: Choose the language for menus, buttons, and other interface text.
strings.mobile.profile.title: Profile
strings.mobile.profile.clearCacheMessage: Removes cached reads and downloads from this device. Queued changes are kept until they sync.
strings.mobile.profile.dyslexiaFriendlyDescripti: Rounded type, extra spacing, and relaxed line height app-wide.
strings.mobile.dashboard.empty.dueThisWeek: Nothing due this week. Enjoy the breathing room!
strings.mobile.dashboard.empty.courses.title: No courses yet
strings.mobile.dashboard.empty.courses.message: Courses you enroll in will show up here.
strings.mobile.courses.title: Courses
strings.mobile.courses.empty.title: No courses yet
strings.mobile.courses.empty.message: Courses you enroll in will show up here.
strings.mobile.courses.emptyContent.title: No content yet
strings.mobile.courses.emptyContent.message: Modules and assignments will appear here once published.
strings.mobile.courses.grades.empty.title: No graded work yet
strings.mobile.courses.grades.empty.message: Grades will appear here as assignments are graded.
strings.mobile.inbox.compose.subject: Subject
strings.mobile.inbox.empty.message: Course activity and updates will appear here.
strings.mobile.announcements.empty.title: No announcements
strings.mobile.item.submission.title: Your submission
strings.mobile.item.submission.webOnly: Submit this assignment from the web app.
strings.mobile.item.quiz.summary: A quick look at how this quiz is set up.
strings.mobile.auth.sessionRevoked: Your session was signed out remotely. Sign in again to continue.
strings.mobile.biometric.toggleDescription: Require biometrics after the app has been in the background for a minute.
strings.mobile.biometric.lockedSubtitle: Use %@ or your device passcode to continue.
strings.mobile.sessions.title: Active sessions
strings.mobile.sessions.profileHint: See where you're signed in and sign out lost devices.
strings.mobile.sessions.description: These devices and browsers can access your account. Sign out anything you do not recognize.
strings.mobile.sessions.signOutOthersConfirm: Sign out all other sessions? Other browsers and devices will need to sign in again. This device stays signed in.
strings.mobile.sessions.emptyMessage: Only this device is signed in right now.
strings.mobile.sessions.revokeError: Could not sign out that device.
strings.mobile.sessions.revokeOthersError: Could not sign out other sessions.
strings.mobile.onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to Lextures
strings.mobile.onboarding.welcome.subtitle: Let's personalize your learning path in about five minutes. You can skip any step.
strings.mobile.onboarding.topic.title: What do you want to learn?
strings.mobile.onboarding.topic.subtitle: Pick a topic and describe your goal.
strings.mobile.onboarding.goal.label: Your goal
strings.mobile.onboarding.goal.placeholder: e.g. I want to learn Python by July
strings.mobile.onboarding.targetDate.label: Target date
strings.mobile.onboarding.experience.title: Your experience level
strings.mobile.onboarding.experience.beginnerHin: I am new to this topic
strings.mobile.onboarding.experience.advancedHin: I want to deepen existing skills
strings.mobile.onboarding.diagnostic.title: Quick placement quiz (optional)
strings.mobile.onboarding.diagnostic.subtitle: Five short questions help us suggest the right starting course. You can skip without penalty.
strings.mobile.onboarding.habits.title: Study habits
strings.mobile.onboarding.habits.reminderHint: Separate from terms of service. Unchecked by default.
strings.mobile.onboarding.consent.title: Consent
strings.mobile.onboarding.consent.terms: I accept the Terms of Service (required)
strings.mobile.onboarding.complete.title: You're all set!
strings.mobile.onboarding.complete.subtitle: Your dashboard is personalized from day one.
strings.mobile.onboarding.complete.browseCatalog: Browse the catalog to find courses matching your goal.
